en_title: Ryan Reynolds Teases Deadpool 4, Hints There's Still a 'Few Deep Cuts' to Adapt From the Comics
cn_title: 瑞安·雷诺兹暗示《死侍4》将挖掘漫画冷门故事
subtitle: 还有素材可拍

paragraphs.en: Deadpool star Ryan Reynolds has discussed plans for his fourth outing as the merc with a mouth, and said there was still "deep cuts" from the Marvel comics that his next film could feature.
paragraphs.cn: 《死侍》主演瑞安·雷诺兹谈到自己第四次饰演这位话痨雇佣兵的计划，并称漫威漫画中仍有一些「冷门内容」可供下一部电影采用。

paragraphs.en: Reynolds has starred in three Deadpool films to date, with 2024's Deadpool & Wolverine earning a cool $1.3 billion at the box office. A sequel seems assured, and Reynolds has previously said he was working on ideas, even if a follow-up still sounds fairly far-off.
paragraphs.cn: 雷诺兹至今主演三部《死侍》，2024年《死侍与金刚狼》取得1.3 billion，即13亿美元(约合人民币88亿元)票房。续集似乎板上钉钉；他此前也说正在构思，只是新作听起来仍很遥远。

paragraphs.en: Now, speaking at Fanatics Fest (via HobbyNonsense ), Reynolds suggested he was looking to tap fresh material from the Deadpool comics for a fourth movie, even highlighting several writers whose comic book runs he admired.
paragraphs.cn: 雷诺兹在Fanatics Fest活动上表示，他希望第四部电影从《死侍》漫画中挖掘新素材，并点名赞赏数位漫画作者。

paragraphs.en: "There's a few really deep cuts that are missing from the movies, I think," Reynolds said. "There's certainly some stuff that I love that Fabian [Nicieza] wrote that is incredible. Gerry Duggan is a friend and an incredible comic book writer. There's stuff coming, there eventually will be another Deadpool film."
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「我认为电影里还缺了几个很冷门的故事。Fabian Nicieza写过一些我非常喜欢、非常精彩的内容。Gerry Duggan是我的朋友，也是出色的漫画作者。会有新内容，最终一定会有另一部《死侍》电影。」

paragraphs.en: Nicieza wrote the first solo Deadpool run and is credited with helping create the character. He followed up his work on Deadpool: The Circle Chase with other series, such as Cable & Deadpool and Deadpool & Cable: Split Second.
paragraphs.cn: Nicieza创作了首部《死侍》个人连载，也是角色共同创作者之一。完成《Deadpool: The Circle Chase》后，他又创作《Cable & Deadpool》和《Deadpool & Cable: Split Second》等系列。

paragraphs.en: Duggan is notable for penning Deadpool: Dracula's Gauntlet, Deadpool vs. SHIELD, Deadpool Does Shakespeare, and Wedding of Deadpool, among many others. He also contributed to the script of Insomniac video game Sunset Overdrive, prior to that studio's work on Spider-Man.
paragraphs.cn: Duggan的代表作包括《Deadpool: Dracula’s Gauntlet》《Deadpool vs. SHIELD》《Deadpool Does Shakespeare》和《Wedding of Deadpool》等。他还参与Insomniac游戏《日落过载》的剧本，之后该工作室才制作《蜘蛛侠》。

paragraphs.en: When will we next see Deadpool on the big screen? So far, no plans have been made concrete — and there's no suggestion (yet) that Reynolds will be back for this year's Avengers: Doomsday , which looks to be a more serious and somber affair.
paragraphs.cn: 下一次何时能在大银幕看到死侍？目前没有具体计划，也没有迹象表明雷诺兹会出现在今年风格更严肃阴郁的《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》中。

paragraphs.en: Over the past year, Reynolds has said he has been developing an idea for an ensemble film, with The Hollywood Reporter claiming that multiple X-Men characters could potentially be involved. However, Reynolds has also admitted he has only been working on the idea privately, without a formal pitch to Marvel — which is itself busy making an X-Men reboot of its own.
paragraphs.cn: 过去一年，雷诺兹称自己在构思一部群像电影。《好莱坞报道者》称其中可能涉及多名X战警角色。但他也承认只是私下创作，尚未正式向忙于制作X战警重启版的漫威提案。

paragraphs.en: In April, speaking to Today , Reynolds firmed up his idea of a team-up movie, and suggested that he's moved on from making solo Deadpool movies altogether . "I have some stuff written," Reynolds said at the time, "but I don't think I'm ever going to center him again. He's a supporting character, he's a guy that is great in a group."
paragraphs.cn: 今年4月，雷诺兹接受Today采访时进一步确认组队电影构想，并暗示已不再想制作死侍个人电影。他说：「我写了一些东西，但不认为还会让他当核心。他是配角，是个非常适合群体的家伙。」

opus_summary: 瑞安·雷诺兹确认未来终会有另一部《死侍》电影，并希望从漫画中挖掘尚未改编的冷门故事。不过他更倾向让死侍担任群像片配角，而非继续独挑大梁。
